## Type

## Checklist
- [ ] One concept = one file; numbered for order.
- [ ] Bilingual parity (same relative path in each `content/<lang>/`), if multilingual.
- [ ] Front matter present; portable Markdown; relative links resolve.
- [ ] New references accessed & dated.
- [ ] Ethics/safety framing for any hazardous content.
